[?2004l; ModuleID = '-'
source_filename = "-"

@a = global i32 0

define i32 @main() {
entry:
  %retval = alloca i32, align 4
  store i32 0, ptr %retval, align 4
  store i32 10, ptr @a, align 4
  %0 = load i32, ptr @a, align 4
  %1 = icmp sgt i32 %0, 0
  br i1 %1, label %if.then, label %if.end

return:                                           ; preds = %return_exit1, %if.end, %if.then
  %2 = load i32, ptr %retval, align 4
  ret i32 %2

if.then:                                          ; preds = %entry
  store i32 1, ptr %retval, align 4
  br label %return

if.end:                                           ; preds = %entry
  store i32 0, ptr %retval, align 4
  br label %return

return_exit:                                      ; No predecessors!

return_exit1:                                     ; No predecessors!
  br label %return
}
[?2004h
